welcome.card_approval_desc: Value-based multi-level approval chains with delegation and auto-escalation.
welcome.card_audit_desc: Append-only audit trail, document access logs, and full bilingual (EN/AR) support.
welcome.card_committee_desc: Technical and financial committees score bids independently. Two-envelope support.
welcome.card_prequal_desc: Document-backed vendor onboarding with admin review and category-based matching.
welcome.card_sealed_desc: AES-256 encryption of bid pricing until opening date. Dual authorization for bid opening.
welcome.card_tender_desc: Multi-step tender creation with BOQ builder, document versioning, addenda, and clarifications.
welcome.hero_subhead: MPC Group's construction procurement platform — from vendor prequalification through sealed bid submission, committee evaluation, multi-level approval, and award notification.
